component.name: list
component.description: List component supporting ordered, unordered, and icon-annotated lists with two nesting levels and three style variants. Includes a reusable List item atom and a List container. Fully bilingual (LTR/RTL).

variant_count.note: Container: 2 RTL × 3 Style × 3 Type = 18. Item atom: 2 RTL × 3 Type × 2 Level × 3 Style = 36.

rtl_css_selector.reason: RTL indent is handled via CSS logical property padding-inline-start, which automatically flips for [dir=rtl] contexts. No separate [dir=rtl] CSS selector needed for indentation. Flex direction reversal for RTL marker order is handled by the browser dir attribute, not by a CSS modifier.

container.description: Column flex container. Uses ol for ordered type, ul for unordered and with-icon types.

item.description: Row flex item. gap=8px between marker and text.

marker.description: Text-based marker. Not present for with-icon type.

icon.description: Icon wrapper. Present only for with-icon type. Contains an SVG with aria-hidden=true.

component_level._note: All component tokens are missing from token.css. Fallback values from manifest used. TODO: add to token.css.

style..list--on-color: On-color style: white text (requires colored background context)

implementation_notes: Container uses display:flex (not inline-flex) for block-level list layout.
role='list' is added to the container to restore VoiceOver/Safari list semantics when list-style:none is applied.
padding-inline-start logical property handles Level Two indent for both LTR and RTL without a separate CSS selector.
Marker order in RTL (number after Arabic text) is handled by the browser's natural flex + dir=rtl behavior.
Icon SVG must carry aria-hidden='true'. Accessible label is provided by .list__text.
The On-Color style variant requires a dark or brand-color background in the consuming layout.
No interactive states. No focus ring. No hover/active/disabled states.
